summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster and no shared canonical should be invented, so all five open PRs are classified independently and left open for normal maintainer review. No close, merge, fix, label, or comment mutation is planned.

actions.reason: Independent ready-for-maintainer contributor PR; no shared canonical or closure basis exists in this inventory shard.
Independent ready-for-maintainer contributor PR; it should remain open for maintainer technical review rather than be closed or grouped into this inventory shard.
Independent large contributor PR with meaningful implementation and test changes; no low-signal or superseded evidence supports closure.
Independent maintainer-owned draft PR; keep open and do not close, label, merge, or supersede from an inventory shard.
Independent maintainer-owned draft hardening PR; keep open for maintainer review and do not route to security absent a boundary-bypass claim.
